title: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from
display_title: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from
wikitext:
[]: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Mon Jan 23, 2012 11:17 pm So, the Harpies have S^2 engines that allow them to operate without power and regenerate right? Where in the world did they get them from? Did SEELE somehow manage to discover how to manufacture them?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Jan 23, 2012 11:20 pm Yes. Implicitly by the data they got from Unit 01, or maybe by reverse-engineering Shamshel's core.

[]: Re: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 24, 2012 2:33 am chaosakita wrote: So, the Harpies have S^2 engines that allow them to operate without power and regenerate right? Where in the world did they get them from? Did SEELE somehow manage to discover how to manufacture them?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jan 24, 2012 3:31 am Around 14:00 of episode 17: Gendo wrote: Unit 04 and the 2nd Branch are acceptable. Even with the S2 engine, we may have lost the sample, but we still have the data in Germany.

[]: Re: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Jan 24, 2012 5:17 pm Ornette wrote: Probably the same source that Eva-04 and Eva-03 got theirs from. Grown or manufactured with data from Shamshel.

[]: Re: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jan 24, 2012 5:19 pm Allemann wrote: From where did you get that Eva-03 had an S2 organ?

[]: Re: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by r0ach » Sat Jan 28, 2012 1:39 am Allemann wrote: From where did you get that Eva-03 had an S2 organ?

[]: Re: Where did the harpies get their S2 engines from?             Quote Post by BC Baron » Sat Jan 28, 2012 2:48 am r0ach wrote: All angels have an S2 organ. Unit-03 was possessed by angel, so it seems reasonable that a s2 organ got mixed in there somewhere

[]:             Quote Post by GiftedPilot » Fri Oct 19, 2012 8:17 pm Early on, in the episode where the second branch disappeared, it is stated that, while they lost the s^2 engine prototype, they still had all the data. maybe the copies of the MAGI helped SEELE rebuild it for the EVA construction

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Dec 18, 2012 4:40 pm SEELE built 'em, stuck them into their fish-headed EVAs, and that's really all the explanation we get.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Dec 18, 2012 7:52 pm After the berserk incident with Unit 01 in episode 19, perhaps Seele managed to obtain genetic information from the S² Engine which was obtained. As we know, cloning and building from Angelic material is common in Eva, and I have simply assumed that Seele did just that in order to utilize multiple engines in the mass-produced Evas. Another possibility of where they obtained a copy of, or even original S² Engine could have also been Shamshel's core, which was salvaged in episodes 3/4. We know that it was then sent to the Third Branch in Germany, to be studied by their Energy Analysis Unit. We have seen evidence that Nerv generally answers to Seele as a higher authority, so this instance could have also been a chance for Seele to obtain an S² Engine. I have generally assumed that the S² Engines used in the mass-produced Evas are genetic copies of the originals.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Dec 18, 2012 8:15 pm ReiAyanami25 wrote: After the berserk incident with Unit 01 in episode 19, perhaps Seele managed to obtain genetic information from the S² Engine which was obtained. As we know, cloning and building from Angelic material is common in Eva, and I have simply assumed that Seele did just that in order to utilize multiple engines in the mass-produced Evas. Another possibility of where they obtained a copy of, or even original S² Engine could have also been Shamshel's core, which was salvaged in episodes 3/4. We know that it was then sent to the Third Branch in Germany, to be studied by their Energy Analysis Unit. We have seen evidence that Nerv generally answers to Seele as a higher authority, so this instance could have also been a chance for Seele to obtain an S² Engine. I have generally assumed that the S² Engines used in the mass-produced Evas are genetic copies of the originals.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Dec 18, 2012 8:17 pm riffraff11235 wrote: My understanding was that they studied the salvaged remnants of Shamshel's core in order to make the S2 engines.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Dec 19, 2012 9:17 am So am I to take it that to core might not have been in tact if Shinji hadn't done his impulsive attack to kill Shamshel? If so, I kind of like that this random impulsive action Shinji did in the first episodes is what indirectly lead to some of the later tragedies of the series.

Where in the world did they get them from? Did SEELE somehow manage to discover how to manufacture them?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Jan 23, 2012 11:20 pm Y
